calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury. This matter having been sent to Judge Pro Tem was able to settle.

Appearances: Ray Gajiwala, (415) 550-9315, plaintiff in pro per.
Steve L. Hudekoff, (415) 424-7242, defendant in pro per

Terms of the settlement as follows: Parties stipulated that defendant Steve L. Hudekoff to vacate property located on 3308 Mission St., Room 16, San Francisco, CA. 94110 by May 12, 2004, and defendant will receive $200.00 credit if he vacates on that date. Stipulation filed.

Judge Robert Dondero, Clerks: D. Boffi/V.Mu Reporter Jo Ann Bryce (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Off Calendar
